caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I DON'T NEVER DO SHIT" printed in white and black is speaking into a professional microphone. He is seated in a room filled with framed photographs on the walls and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt in the background. Clothing racks are visible further back in the room. On the lower left, a circular logo reads "BOOST MODE," and on the lower right, red text reads "BOOST MODE TOT." Across the sequence, the man maintains his position and expression, though his mouth moves slightly as he speaks, and his head shifts marginally. The environment remains static, with the lighting and positioning of the equipment and background items remaining unchanged throughout the short clip.
